reason: An optional custom tile border colour is a functional addition for grouping targets by colour, not a redesign. The diff adds a TileColor field to TargetItem, tints the existing sq.BorderBrush in MakeBubble when set (slightly thicker so it reads, otherwise the theme border as before), and adds a row of clickable preset swatches to the target editor. Wheel geometry, layout, animations and the theme palettes are untouched — only one target's own border colour changes when the user opts in. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
